rule_description: Trigger when spend is high but conversions are zero for a campaign period.
Trigger when return on ad spend falls below the campaign target.
Trigger when cost per acquisition is above the campaign target.
Trigger when click-through rate is below the campaign target.
Trigger when spend is materially higher than the previous comparable period.
Trigger when impressions fall sharply versus the previous comparable period.
Trigger when an active campaign records zero impressions.
Trigger when spend exceeds the allocated daily or total budget.
